message:
test(ftui-widgets): add 17 proptest invariants for Fenwick tree

Property tests cover: from_values/sequential equivalence, prefix sum
correctness, get/set round-trip, range telescoping, batch vs sequential
update, rebuild/from_values agreement, resize preservation, find_prefix
validity, total consistency, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
